title: indigofera efoliata
intro: Indigofera efoliata, also known as the small leafed indigo plant, is a perennial legume native to tropical regions of Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Indigofera efoliata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Indigofera efoliata typically involve drying the leaves and stems, then infusing them in hot water to make a tea or decoction, or using them in a tincture or capsule form.
